title: DevTech
description: Devtech is a mod that is a small wishlist of things Zook wanted for Gregtech Community Edition and CraftTweaker.
body:
Devtech is a mod that is a small wishlist of things Zook wanted for Gregtech Community Edition and CraftTweaker. 

Zook has abondoned this project and gave me permission to continue.

This is an addon for [GTCEu](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/gregtech-ce-unofficial) (not on modrinth yet)

Adds support for custom

- Machines/Generator (electric or steam) for GTCEu
- recipe maps for machines
- metaitem's for mass generating
- Stone ore types
- material recipe generation handler
- items like batteries, food and fluid cells

via CraftTweaker
